mechanism: Slower recovery from economic crises (correlated with older demographics) prolongs fiscal deterioration as counter-cyclical spending extends and tax revenue recovery takes longer. Each crisis therefore deepens the fiscal challenge under aging demographics.
regime_dependence: Rank correlation ~0.7-0.8 across 8 post-1970 crises. Confounded by policy and structural variables but pattern is consistent. Implies US recession recoveries of 6-10 years going forward.
